texto: It's easy to be worried about the media's influence on our lives. But there is a need for us to also simply be kind to ourselves, to be kind to our bodies. Not just because we deserve more respect and more self-care, but also because the world deserves more of our attention, and we just can't give it out if it's diverted to obsessing over our thighs.
explicacao: Citação de Rosie Molinary sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “It's easy to be worried about the media's influence on our lives. But there is a need for us to a…” articula amor, body-image, feminism em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como feminism e self-love.
